name: Angel's Fanfare
description: Notes Part of the Angelic Bard Set.
effects: Party Effect: Within 4 squares Inspired for 4 seconds.Party Effect: Within 4 squares HP Boost (+80 HP) for 4 seconds.If Harmonious Harp equipped: ATT Boost (+8 ATT) on self for 4 seconds (cooldown: 0.5 seconds)If Wings of Sanctity equipped: DEF Boost (+12 DEF) on self for 4 seconds (cooldown: 0.5 seconds)If Heavenly Halo equipped: Within 4 squares Healing for 4 seconds (cooldown: 0.5 seconds)
